nasb.text: And now they sin more and more, And make for themselves molten images, Idols skillfully made from their silver, All of them the work of craftsmen. They say of them, “Let the men who sacrifice kiss the calves!”

esv.text: And now they sin more and more, and make for themselves metal images, idols skillfully made of their silver, all of them the work of craftsmen. It is said of them, “Those who offer human sacrifice kiss calves!”

cnv.text: 現在他們犯罪越來越多， 為自己做鑄像， 按著自己的技巧，用自己的銀子做偶像； 這些都是匠人的手工。 他們論到這些說：“向偶像獻祭的人，可以親吻牛犢。”

ccb.text: 如今他们作恶日甚， 凭借自己的聪明用银子铸造神像， 但这不过是匠人之作。 人们议论他们说： “那些献祭的人竟亲吻牛犊偶像！”
